login.title: Welcome to CampusForge
login.subtitle: Sign in to access resources, courses, and the community.

home.title: Build, share, and learn together.
home.lede: CampusForge connects students through open-source projects, shared resources, and collaborative courses. Request an invitation to join.
home.joinDesc: Submit your invitation request and start exploring resources, courses, and governance documents.
home.resourcesDesc: Guides, templates, tools, and internal documents shared by community members.
home.coursesDesc: Self-paced paths, workshops, onboarding programs, and active cohorts.
home.policiesDesc: Code of conduct, invitation rules, resource sharing policies, and security guidelines.

apply.title: Request Invitation
apply.subtitle: Submit your application to join the CampusForge community. An admin will review your request.
apply.reason: Why do you want to join?
apply.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us about your interests and what you hope to contribute...
apply.verificationSent: Verification code sent. Check your inbox.
apply.whatNextDesc: After you submit your application, an admin will review your request. You can check the status at any time.
apply.eligibilityDesc: You need a valid school email address and a student ID. Applications are reviewed based on community guidelines.
apply.successDesc: Your application has been received. You can check its status at any time.
apply.verificationInvalid: The verification code is invalid or expired.
apply.verificationSendFailed: Unable to send the code. Try again later.
apply.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
apply.duplicateEmail: An application already exists for this email.

status.title: Application Status
status.subtitle: Enter your school email to look up your application.
status.notFound: No application found for this email.
status.stepVerifyingDesc: School email and student ID are being verified.
status.stepReviewDesc: An admin is reviewing your application.
status.stepDecisionDesc: You will be notified of the final decision.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Guides, templates, tools, and documents shared by the community.

issues.title: {org} Issues
issues.subtitle: Browse open issues across the organization, claim one, and start contributing.
issues.claimLocalOnly: Added to your task list; GitHub token is missing or unavailable, so remote assignment was skipped.
issues.alreadyClaimed: This task has already been claimed.
issues.claimFailed: Unable to claim this issue. Try again later.
issues.connectGitHubFirst: Connect your GitHub username in Profile first.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: Curated open courses, community tutorials, and learning paths.

policies.title: Policies & Governance
policies.subtitle: Community rules, guidelines, and governance documents.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Manage applications, members, and community resources.
admin.reviewFinalized: This application has been reviewed and can no longer be changed.
admin.courseSubtitle: Manage community courses and learning paths.
admin.settingsSubtitle: Manage runtime configuration. Leave sensitive fields blank to keep existing values.
admin.adminSettingsSubtitle: Configure which emails can sign in to the admin console.
admin.githubSettingsSubtitle: Configure the organization, API token, and OAuth login.
admin.emailSettingsSubtitle: Used for application verification codes and system notices.
admin.verificationSettingsSubtitle: Control code lifetime and resend intervals.
admin.appSettingsSubtitle: Control runtime behavior. The session secret is status-only.
admin.loggingSettingsSubtitle: Control server file log level and surface errors in the admin console.
admin.storageSettingsSubtitle: These paths affect config file locations and are not hot-editable.
admin.secretConfigured: Configured; leave blank to keep it
admin.systemErrorsSubtitle: Recent records from the server error log.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.githubOverview: Commits, pull requests, issues, and organization activity.
profile.githubConnectHint: Connect your real GitHub account with OAuth before claiming tasks or showing contribution stats.
profile.githubOauthNote: GitHub tokens are not stored in source; only the verified GitHub identity is recorded.
profile.githubOauthNotConfigured: GitHub OAuth is not configured. Add client_id and client_secret in config.toml first.
profile.passwordHint: Only change the admin password when needed.
profile.passwordChangeFailed: Unable to change password. Check the current password and new password length.
